_baseworks_meta.slo_note: Critical when any tenant reaches 100% — sign-upload returns HTTP 413 quota_exceeded and uploads are blocked for that tenant. Forward-looking: requires custom-metrics wiring (v1.4+ OTLP) to emit storage.quota.pct. Until then, monitor via /health/detailed data.storage.quota.tenantsAtLimit (which also flips the storage contributor to degraded).
